name: measured-auto-height
title: Measured Auto Height
author: Elliot Sutton and contributors
description: Transitions a container to the measured height of changing caller-provided content.

changes: Changed the hook import to the copied source-local file.
Removed the broken asChild branch and its Slot dependency.
Preserved natural height until the first measurement and made measured height authoritative.
Represented the initial unmeasured height as undefined instead of zero.
Coalesced and cancelled queued animation frames during ResizeObserver updates.
Stopped observing the animated parent and included the measurement callback in effect dependencies.

license.scope: Only the two source files listed above at commit 38b917762e3b6059c06a7af703071ba11a89091e
notices: The upstream root license changed after this snapshot; no file from the later Commons-Clause revisions is included. See registry/sources/animate-ui/NOTICE.md.

modifications.change: Localized the hook import, removed broken Slot composition, preserved natural initial height, and added a reduced-motion snap.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component self-contained, visible before measurement, and safe for motion-sensitive users without redesigning its measured-height behavior.

modifications.change: Used an undefined initial measurement, coalesced and cancelled ResizeObserver frames, stopped observing the animated parent, and refreshed the effect when measurement logic changes.
modifications.reason: Prevent a zero-height first render, feedback-loop work, stale measurements, and state updates after cleanup.
